title: Examining Parkinson's disease
description: KNYSNA NEWS - Parkinson's disease is a...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Parkinson's disease is a brain disorder that causes involuntary or uncontrollable movements, such as shaking, stiffness, and difficulty with balance and coordination.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Parkinson's disease is a brain disorder that causes involuntary or uncontrollable movements, such as shaking, stiffness, and difficulty with balance and coordination."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Symptoms usually begin gradually and worsen over time."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"As the disease progresses, people may have difficulty in walking and talking. They may also have mental and behavioural changes, sleep problems, depression, memory difficulties, and fatigue.","html":"As the disease progresses, people may have difficulty in walking and talking. They may also have mental and behavioural changes, sleep problems, depression, memory difficulties, and fatigue."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Basal ganglia","html":"Basal ganglia"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"It affects men more than women and most people develop it after the age of 60."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The basal ganglia is an area of the brain that controls movement. The neurons (nerve cells) in the basal ganglia produce a brain hormone known as dopamine which is a neurotransmitter.","html":"The basal ganglia is an area of the brain that controls movement. The neurons (nerve cells) in the basal ganglia produce a brain hormone known as dopamine which is a neurotransmitter."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Dopamine","html":"Dopamine"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"When these cells are damaged or die less dopamine is produced. This causes a loss of connection between the brain and other body parts which in turn results in the loss of control of body movements.","html":"When these cells are damaged or die less dopamine is produced. This causes a loss of connection between the brain and other body parts which in turn results in the loss of control of body movements."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The exact cause of Parkinson's disease is not known. In most cases the disease does not seem to run in families.","html":"The exact cause of Parkinson's disease is not known. In most cases the disease does not seem to run in families."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Alpha-synuclein","html":"Alpha-synuclein"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Autopsy studies of people with Parkinson's disease have shown that some of the brain cells contain clumps of a protein called alpha-synuclein. These clumps are known as Lewy bodies. It is thought that they damage healthy brain cells and the fibres connecting them.","html":"Autopsy studies of people with Parkinson's disease have shown that some of the brain cells contain clumps of a protein called alpha-synuclein. These clumps are known as Lewy bodies. It is thought that they damage healthy brain cells and the fibres connecting them."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Similar findings have been noted in the brains of people with Alzheimer's disease.","html":"Similar findings have been noted in the brains of people with Alzheimer's disease."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Pesticides, heavy metals","html":"Pesticides, heavy metals"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"However the exact significance of these findings is not completely understood.","html":"However the exact significance of these findings is not completely understood."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"In some cases Parkinson's disease has been linked to exposure earlier in life to pesticides and heavy metals such as lead, mercury, manganese and cadmium."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Traumatic brain injury is also strongly implicated as a risk factor. Well described in boxers, Muhammad Ali was the best known case.","html":"Traumatic brain injury is also strongly implicated as a risk factor. Well described in boxers, Muhammad Ali was the best known case."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"-Dr Giovanni Coci, Specialist Physician","html":"-Dr Giovanni Coci, Specialist Physician"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram.","html":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok.","html":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone.","html":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone."}]
